name: Apple
notes: Apple Account supports passwordless 'Sign in with Passkey' per Apple's iCloud.com sign-in guide (at iCloud.com / appleid.apple.com); requires iCloud Keychain and an iPhone/iPad on iOS/iPadOS 17 or later, so passwordless works via Apple devices. Apple Account also supports FIDO security keys as a second factor (support.apple.com/102637).
